features.name: Ability Score Increase (CON +2)
features.description: Your Constitution score increases by 2.

features.name: Speed
features.description: Your base walking speed is 25 feet. Your speed is not reduced by heavy armor.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: Accustomed to life undergound, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60ft of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

features.name: Dwarvish Resilience
features.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance to poison damage.

features.name: Weapon Proficiency
features.description: Proficient with: battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, warhammer.

features.name: Dwarvish Weapon Training
features.description: You have profiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

features.name: Tool Proficiency: Smith's Tools
features.description: Proficient with Smith's Tools.

features.name: Tool Proficiency
features.description: You gain proficiency with the artisan's tools of your choice: smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools.

features.name: Stonecunning
features.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to the origin of stonework, you are considered proficient in the History skill and add double your proficiency bonus to the check, instead of your normal proficiency bonus.

features.name: Languages
features.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Dwarvish.

features.name: Ability Score Increase (WIS +1)
features.description: Your Wisdom score increases by 1.

features.name: Dwarvish Toughness
features.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

features.name: Skill Proficiency: History
features.description: Proficiency in the History skill.

features.name: Skill Proficiency: Persuaion
features.description: Proficiency in the Persuaion skill.

features.name: Tool Proficiency: Three-Dragon Ante Set
features.description: Proficient with Three-Dragon Ante Set.

features.name: Positiion of Privilege
features.description: Thanks to your noble birth, people are inclined to think the best of you. You are welcome in high society, and people assume you have the right to be wherever you are. The common folk make every effort to accommodate you and avoid your displeasure, and other people of high birth treat you as a member of the same social sphere. You can secure an audience with a local noble if you need to.

features.name: Expanded Spell List
features.description: 1st Level: Burning Hands, Command, 2nd Level: Blindness/Deafness, Scorching Ray, 3rd Level: Fireball, Stinking Cloud, 4th Level: Fire Shield, Wall of Fire, 5th Level: Flame Strike, Hallow

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.description: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 hit points, you gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier + your warlock level (minimum of 1).

features.name: Eldritch Invocations: Agonizing Blast
features.description: You gain two eldritch invocations of your choice. When you gain certain warlock levels, you gain additional invocations of your choice. A level prerequisite refers to your level in this class. Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations: Armor of Shadows
features.description: You gain two eldritch invocations of your choice. When you gain certain warlock levels, you gain additional invocations of your choice. A level prerequisite refers to your level in this class. Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

A level prerequisite refers to your level in this class. Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

A level prerequisite refers to your level in this class. Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations: Bond of the Talisman
features.description: You gain two eldritch invocations of your choice. When you gain certain warlock levels, you gain additional invocations of your choice. A level prerequisite refers to your level in this class. Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

features.name: Pact Boon: Pact of the Blade
Eldritch Invocations (Additional)
features.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.description: You can call on your patron to alter fate in your favor. When you make an ability check or a saving throw, you can use this feature to add a d10 to your roll. You can do so after seeing the initial roll but before any of the roll's effects occur. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (Additional)
features.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (Additional)
features.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

features.name: Fiendish Resilience
features.description: You can choose one damage type when you finish a short or long rest. You gain resistance to that damage type until you choose a different one with this feature. Damage from magical weapons or silver weapons ignores this resistance.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level): Arcane Gate↗
features.description: You gain a 6th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (Additional)
features.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level): Etherealness↗
features.description: You gain a 7th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Hurl Through Hell
features.description: When you hit a creature with an attack, you can use this feature to instantly transport the target through the lower planes. The creature disappears and hurtles through a nightmare landscape. At the end of your next turn, the target returns to the space it previously occupied, or the nearest unoccupied space. If the target is not a fiend, it takes 10d10 psychic damage as it reels from its horrific experience. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level): Dominate Monster↗
features.description: You gain a 8th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (Additional)
features.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level): Astral Projection↗
features.description: You gain a 9th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations (Additional)
features.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: You can spend 1 minute entreating your patron for aid to regain all your expended spell slots from your Pact Magic feature. Once you regain spell slots with this feature, you must finish a long rest before you can do so again.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: A simple melee or ranged weapon.
